mapper.sql: t.task_id, t.project_id, t.milestone_id, t.parent_task_id, t.assignee_id, u.full_name AS assignee_name, t.title, t.description, t.start_date, t.due_date, t.status, t.priority
FROM task t LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = t.assignee_id
mapper.select: SELECT tt.task_id, tag.name AS tag_name FROM task_tag tt JOIN tag ON tag.tag_id = tt.tag_id JOIN task t ON t.task_id = tt.task_id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT tag.name FROM task_tag tt JOIN tag ON tag.tag_id = tt.tag_id WHERE tt.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY tag.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (task_id, project_id, milestone_id, parent_task_id, assignee_id, title, description, start_date, due_date, status, priority) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{projectId}, #{milestoneId}, #{parentTaskId}, #{assigneeId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{dueDate}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'NOT_STARTED'), COALESCE(#{priority}, 'MEDIUM'))
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = #{status} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_tag (task_id, tag_id) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{tagId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM task_tag WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
